description: Calculate estimated time of arrival and driving distance between two geographic points, supporting both preliminary (straight-line) and precise (routing-based) calculations.

actors.name: Platform
actors.description: Computes ETAs on order creation and on demand via the distance-and-time endpoint.

fields.name: order_id
fields.label: Order the ETA is being computed for.

rules.rule_01: A preliminary distance and time estimate is computed at order creation from the pickup to the first waypoint (or drop-off).
rules.rule_02: The preliminary estimate uses a fast approximate method (geodesic calculation); precise routing is done on demand.
rules.rule_03: The on-demand distance-and-time endpoint returns real driving distance and time using a routing engine (e.g., OSRM).
rules.rule_04: Both origin and destination must be valid non-null geographic coordinates.
rules.rule_05: Calculated distance (meters) and time (seconds) are stored on the order record.
rules.rule_06: ETA can be recalculated at any point during the trip by calling the distance-and-time endpoint.

given: order is created with valid pickup and drop-off coordinates

then.description: Approximate geodesic distance in meters stored on the order.
Approximate travel time in seconds stored on the order.

preliminary_eta_computed.result: Order record carries initial distance and ETA estimates available immediately after creation.

given: caller requests distance-and-time for an order
order has valid origin and destination coordinates

then.description: Actual driving distance in meters updated from routing engine response.
Actual driving duration in seconds updated from routing engine response.

precise_eta_computed.result: Order's distance and ETA are updated with precise driving route data.

given: origin or destination coordinates are null or invalid
eta_unavailable.result: ETA calculation is skipped; order is created without preliminary estimates.

errors.message: Cannot compute ETA: pickup or drop-off coordinates are missing.
Routing service is temporarily unavailable. Distance estimate may be approximate.

related.reason: Preliminary ETA is computed at order creation; used for customer-facing estimates.
Customer app surfaces ETA to pickup and ETA to drop-off.
Live driver position enables dynamic ETA recalculation.

goals.description: Calculate estimated time of arrival and driving distance between two geographic points, supporting both preliminary (straight-line) and precise (routing-based) calculations.

constraints.description: Data consistency must be maintained across concurrent operations

tradeoffs.reason: data consistency must be maintained across all operations
